events.title: CA Vélez Sarsfield vs. CA Newell's Old Boys
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Primera División Argentina game, scheduled for Friday, March 6, 2026 between CA Vélez Sarsfield and CA Newell's Old Boys.

eventMetadata.context_description: Vélez Sarsfield's dominant home record at Estadio José Amalfitani drives trader consensus toward their 59.5% implied win probability, with five straight unbeaten results there fueling optimism against a road-weary Newell's Old Boys. Recent injury returns bolster Vélez, including forward Braian Romero cleared to start after hamstring recovery, amplifying their top-five attack in the Liga Profesional. Newell's defensive solidity—conceding just three goals in five away draws—props up the 51% draw odds, despite midfield suspensions thinning their squad depth. Head-to-head history shows four stalemates in the last eight meetings, while Vélez's three-match winning streak contrasts Newell's form dip, shaping these closely contested market prices.

events.title: CA Unión vs. CA Talleres
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Primera División Argentina game, scheduled for Friday, March 6, 2026 between CA Unión and CA Talleres.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on the CA Unión vs. CA Talleres matchup reflects a razor-thin contest, with the draw edging out as the slight favorite amid tightly bunched implied probabilities. CA Unión benefits from home-field edge at Estadio 15 de Abril, where they've held firm in recent outings despite middling league form (two wins, two draws in last five), but defensive vulnerabilities exposed by injuries to key center-back Franco Pardo could tilt vulnerability. CA Talleres, riding momentum from three straight away unbeaten results and a stingy backline conceding just 0.8 goals per game on the road, carries superior quality yet faces Unión's resilient low-block setup. Head-to-head history underscores parity—three of the last five encounters ended level—fueling uncertainty and keeping this Argentine Primera División clash deadlocked.

question: Will Russia enter Serhiivka by March 31?
description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if, according to the ISW map, Russia captures any territory of Serhiivka, Donetsk Oblast, (48.311123° N, 36.931008° E) between market creation and the specified date 2026 (ET).

Territory will be considered captured if any part of the specified territory is shaded under a below specified layer on the ISW map (https://storymaps.arcgis.com/stories/36a7f6a6f5a9448496de641cf64bd375) by the resolution date. Otherwise, the market will resolve to “No”.

For any change on the ISW map to qualify for this market’s resolution, the relevant shading indicating Russian control must persist through the next full ISW daily update cycle. If ISW skips a day, shading must persist until the next finalized ISW update is published, regardless of the date. Any continuous shading which reflects either "Assessed Russian Infiltration Areas in Ukraine", “Assessed Russian Control”, “Assessed Russian Advance In Ukraine”, or “Assessed Russian Gains in the Past 24 Hours” will qualify. 

Once a qualifying condition is met, any subsequent loss of control will not be considered towards the resolution of this market.

If Russia comes into control of the specified territory as a result of a negotiated settlement, this will qualify for a 'Yes' resolution, regardless of whether it is shaded red in the ISW map. However, an announcement of a negotiated settlement that gives Russia de jure control will not qualify. Actual control must be established.

The primary resolution source for this market will be the ISW Ukraine map. If the ISW map is rendered unavailable, information from DeepStateMap (https://deepstatemap.live/) may be used. If information from both the ISW and DeepStateMap are rendered permanently unavailable, a consensus of credible reporting may be used.

Note: Any temporary glitches or errors in the map will not be considered.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors no Russian entry into Serhiivka by March 31, reflecting the village's location deep in Ukrainian-controlled Mykolaiv Oblast, over 70 kilometers behind stable front lines from the nearest Russian-held positions near the Kinburn Spit. Recent military assessments show Russian forces concentrated on grinding advances in Donetsk Oblast, such as around Avdiivka and Chasiv Yar, with no reported maneuvers, amphibious preparations, or logistical buildups targeting the Black Sea coastal area near Ochakiv. Ukrainian defenses, bolstered by fortifications and air superiority, further deter incursions. While unforeseen breakthroughs or naval landings remain possible—though improbable given Russia's Black Sea Fleet constraints and time limitations—current dynamics sustain high confidence in the status quo.

question: Will India’s 2026 Annual Inflation be less than 0.75%?
description:
This is a market about the variation of consumer prices in India over the 12-month period ending December 2026, as reported by the Indian Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation (MoSPI).

This market will resolve according to the percentage change in India’s Consumer Price Index (CPI) over the 12-month period ending December 2026 (Year-on-Year inflation, over the same month of the previous year), according to the monthly MoSPI Consumer Price Index report for the specified month.

The resolution source for this market will be the MoSPI Consumer Price Index report released for December 2026, currently scheduled to be released on January 12, 2027. Resolution of this market will take place upon release of the aforementioned data. If no data for the specified month is released by the date the next month's data is scheduled to be released, this market will resolve based on data from the last available month.

The relevant report will be made available upon release at: https://mospi.gov.in/latest-releases

Note: This market’s resolution source reports percentage change in the Indian Consumer Price Index to two decimal points (e.g. 2.01%). Thus this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving this market. For the full release schedule, see: https://www.mospi.gov.in/uploads/documents/releaseCalender/1770293210621-ADVANCE%20RELEASE%20CALENDAR%202026-27%20FINAL%2005.02.2026.pdf

events.title: India Annual Inflation 2026
events.description:

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader sentiment on Polymarket favors India’s annual inflation settling in the 2.25%–2.99% range at 38.5% implied probability for 2026, driven by August CPI printing at 3.65%—a downside surprise that reinforces disinflation amid robust monsoon harvests curbing food pressures and stable global oil prices. RBI’s FY26 projection hovers near 4%, but market-implied odds reflect trader consensus for further moderation below the 4% target, buoyed by potential repo rate cuts as early as December if core inflation eases. Lower bins like 1.50%–2.24% (21.5%) gain traction on supply-side improvements, though risks from geopolitical commodity shocks cap conviction, with 4.50%+ at just 12.5%.

description:
This is a market about the variation of consumer prices in India over the 12-month period ending December 2026, as reported by the Indian Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation (MoSPI).

This market will resolve according to the percentage change in India’s Consumer Price Index (CPI) over the 12-month period ending December 2026 (Year-on-Year inflation, over the same month of the previous year), according to the monthly MoSPI Consumer Price Index report for the specified month.

The resolution source for this market will be the MoSPI Consumer Price Index report released for December 2026, currently scheduled to be released on January 12, 2027. Resolution of this market will take place upon release of the aforementioned data. If no data for the specified month is released by the date the next month's data is scheduled to be released, this market will resolve based on data from the last available month.

The relevant report will be made available upon release at: https://mospi.gov.in/latest-releases

Note: This market’s resolution source reports percentage change in the Indian Consumer Price Index to two decimal points (e.g. 2.01%). Thus this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving this market. For the full release schedule, see: https://www.mospi.gov.in/uploads/documents/releaseCalender/1770293210621-ADVANCE%20RELEASE%20CALENDAR%202026-27%20FINAL%2005.02.2026.pdf

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader sentiment on Polymarket favors India’s annual inflation settling in the 2.25%–2.99% range at 38.5% implied probability for 2026, driven by August CPI printing at 3.65%—a downside surprise that reinforces disinflation amid robust monsoon harvests curbing food pressures and stable global oil prices. RBI’s FY26 projection hovers near 4%, but market-implied odds reflect trader consensus for further moderation below the 4% target, buoyed by potential repo rate cuts as early as December if core inflation eases. Lower bins like 1.50%–2.24% (21.5%) gain traction on supply-side improvements, though risks from geopolitical commodity shocks cap conviction, with 4.50%+ at just 12.5%.

question: Will turnout in the Bangladesh parliamentary election be below 65%?
description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Bangladesh on February 12, 2026.

This market will resolve based on the official voter turnout rate for the 2026 Bangladesh Parliamentary Election, defined as the total number of ballots cast divided by the total number of eligible voters.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher bracket.

If the results of this election are not known by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to the lowest bracket.

This market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Bangladeshi Government, specifically the Bangladesh Election Commission (https://www.ecs.gov.bd/?lang=en).

events.title: Turnout in 2026 Bangladesh Parliamentary Election?
events.description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Bangladesh on February 12, 2026.

This market will resolve based on the official voter turnout rate for the 2026 Bangladesh Parliamentary Election, defined as the total number of ballots cast divided by the total number of eligible voters.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher bracket.

If the results of this election are not known by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to the lowest bracket.

This market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Bangladeshi Government, specifically the Bangladesh Election Commission (https://www.ecs.gov.bd/?lang=en).

eventMetadata.context_description: Traders overwhelmingly price turnout below 65% at 97.6% for Bangladesh's 2026 parliamentary election, reflecting persistent violence and voter distrust after the 2024 uprising that ousted Sheikh Hasina's government. Historical precedents—41% in 2014 and 42% in the boycotted January 2024 vote—compound concerns amid clashes between student groups, BNP activists, and Awami League holdouts, alongside economic woes and slow electoral reforms under interim leader Muhammad Yunus. This skin-in-the-game consensus anticipates apathy or fear limiting participation, despite pledges for polls by late 2026. A realistic challenge would require stabilized security, unified opposition commitments sans boycott, and credible voter registration drives to push probabilities toward 70%+.

question: Will Ulsan HD FC win on 2026-03-07?
description:
In the upcoming game, scheduled for March 7, 2026
If Ulsan HD FC wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

events.title: Ulsan HD FC vs. FC Seoul
events.description: This event is for the upcoming K-League game, scheduled for Saturday, March 7, 2026 between Ulsan HD FC and FC Seoul.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus favors a draw at 46% implied probability for Ulsan HD FC vs. FC Seoul, reflecting their historically tight K League 1 clashes—five of the last eight ending level, often low-scoring affairs under 2.5 goals. Ulsan, league leaders with a six-match unbeaten streak including home dominance (unbeaten in nine at Ulsan World Cup Stadium), edges FC Seoul slightly at 36.5% despite the visitors' recent resilience (three draws in five). No major injuries reported from official updates, but Ulsan's deeper squad and rest advantage after midweek cup action bolster their case, while Seoul's counterattacking threat keeps it close; momentum tilts toward stalemate in this Seoul rivalry renewal.

events.description: This event is for the upcoming K-League game, scheduled for Saturday, March 7, 2026 between Pohang Steelers FC and Gangwon FC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Pohang Steelers FC hold a slight home edge as traders price all outcomes near even at 52.5%, reflecting tight K League 1 standings where both clubs sit mid-table with similar points per game. Recent form underscores the balance: Pohang unbeaten in their last four home matches but vulnerable to counters, while Gangwon FC rides a three-game unbeaten streak away, bolstered by sharp finishing from Lee Sang-heon. Head-to-head history shows frequent draws (four of last six), and no major injuries reported from official updates tilt the scales. Momentum parity and defensive solidity keep implied probabilities bunched, highlighting the wisdom of crowds in this evenly matched clash.

If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

events.title: Pohang Steelers FC vs. Gangwon FC
events.description: This event is for the upcoming K-League game, scheduled for Saturday, March 7, 2026 between Pohang Steelers FC and Gangwon FC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Pohang Steelers FC hold a slight home edge as traders price all outcomes near even at 52.5%, reflecting tight K League 1 standings where both clubs sit mid-table with similar points per game. Recent form underscores the balance: Pohang unbeaten in their last four home matches but vulnerable to counters, while Gangwon FC rides a three-game unbeaten streak away, bolstered by sharp finishing from Lee Sang-heon. Head-to-head history shows frequent draws (four of last six), and no major injuries reported from official updates tilt the scales. Momentum parity and defensive solidity keep implied probabilities bunched, highlighting the wisdom of crowds in this evenly matched clash.

question: Weed rescheduled by June 30?
description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if marijuana is rescheduled down from I to any other level (or is unscheduled completely) by the Drug Enforcement Agency of the United States (https://www.dea.gov/drug-information/drug-scheduling), by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the US government, however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

events.title: Weed rescheduled by...?
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if marijuana is rescheduled down from I to any other level (or is unscheduled completely) by the Drug Enforcement Agency of the United States (https://www.dea.gov/drug-information/drug-scheduling), by March 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the US government, however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: The DEA's proposed rescheduling of marijuana from Schedule I to Schedule III, based on HHS's scientific review concluding lower abuse potential, anchors trader sentiment after the May 2024 Federal Register notice and January 2024 public comment closure. Administrative rulemaking advances without scheduled hearings, but finalization faces delays from legal reviews and the November 5 presidential election. A Trump win could expedite via his expressed support for reform, while a Harris administration might continue Biden-era momentum amid stalled congressional efforts. Traders price in election-linked probabilities, with odds implying modest pre-year-end odds amid potential lawsuits from anti-reform groups.

question: Will Mexico’s 2026 Annual Inflation be less than 2.50%?
description:
This is a market about the variation of consumer prices in Mexico over the 12-month period ending December 2026, as reported by the Mexican National Institute of Statistics and Geography (INEGI).

This market will resolve according to the percentage change in Mexico’s Consumer Price Index over the 12-month period ending December 2026 (annual inflation for the month of December 2026), according to the monthly INEGI National Consumer Price Index (INPC) report for the specified month.

The resolution source for this market will be the INEGI INPC report released for December 2026, expected to be released in January 2027. Resolution of this market will take place upon release of the aforementioned data. If no data for the specified month is released by the date the next month's data is scheduled to be released, this market will resolve based on data from the last available month.

The relevant report will be made available upon release at: https://en.www.inegi.org.mx/app/saladeprensa/

Note: This market’s resolution source reports percentage change in the Mexican Consumer Price Index to two decimal points (e.g. 2.01%). Thus this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving this market. For the full release schedule, see: https://en.www.inegi.org.mx/app/saladeprensa/calendario

eventMetadata.context_description: Polymarket traders price Mexico's 2026 annual inflation most likely in the 4.00%-4.49% band at 40.5% implied probability, reflecting tempered expectations for disinflation amid sticky core pressures. Headline CPI eased to 4.58% year-over-year in September per INEGI data, down from 4.99% in August, while core inflation held at 3.88%, supporting Banxico's recent 25-basis-point rate cut to 10.50% as progress toward its 3% target. However, trader consensus diverges from private-sector forecasts of 3.4% end-2026 (Banxico October survey), factoring in fiscal risks under President Sheinbaum, potential U.S. tariffs, and food supply vulnerabilities that elevate odds for 3.50%-3.99% (24.5%) and higher bins. Watch November 8 CPI and Banxico's November 14 policy meeting for shifts.

question: Charleston Cougars vs. Campbell Fighting Camels
description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for February 14 at 12:00 AM ET:

If the Charleston Cougars win, the market will resolve to "Charleston Cougars".

If the Campbell Fighting Camels win, the market will resolve to "Campbell Fighting Camels".

events.title: Racing Club vs. CA Huracán
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Primera División Argentina game, scheduled for Saturday, March 7, 2026 between Racing Club and CA Huracán.

eventMetadata.context_description: Huracán's league-best defensive record, conceding just 0.8 goals per game, anchors their slight edge in trader consensus at 52.5%, offsetting Racing Club's home advantage at Presidente Perón Stadium where they've won 60% of recent matches. Tight odds reflect both sides' momentum: Huracán unbeaten in seven across all competitions with key midfielder Héctor Fértoli fit after minor knocks, while Racing rides a three-game unbeaten streak but missing suspended forward Johan Carbonero. Head-to-head history shows four draws in the last six encounters, fueling 52% draw pricing amid Argentina Primera División's low-scoring trends (under 2.5 goals in 65% of fixtures). Schedule rest favors neither, keeping this showdown evenly poised for an upset.

question: Will MetaMask launch a token by December 31, 2026?
description:

The primary resolution source for this market will be information from Metamask, however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

question: Variational FDV above $300M one day after launch?
description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Fully Diluted Valuation of Variational's governance token is greater than the value specified in the title 1 day after launch. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No."

The token must be actively, publicly transferable and tradable to be considered a launch.

The FDV will be determined using the total token supply multiplied by the token price.

"1 day after launch" is defined as 4:00 PM ET on the calendar day following launch. The resolution source for this market is the most liquid price source available. If Variational doesn't launch a token by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

question: Will Bitcoin hit $60k or $80k first?
description:
This market will resolve to the lower price in the title if Bitcoin’s price dips to that level or below before it hits the higher title price between the creation of this market and December 31, 2026 at 11:59 PM ET. It will resolve to the higher price in the title if Bitcoin’s price first reaches that level or above before it dips to the lower title price during the same period.

If neither price level is reached within the market timeframe, the market will resolve 50–50.

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "High" and "Low" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT with “1m” and “Candles” selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Will the Arizona Cardinals win the 2027 NFL league championship?
description:
This market will resolve according to the team that wins the 2027 NFL league championship. 

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed team to win the 2027 NFL league championship per the rules of the NFL (e.g., they are eliminated in the playoffs), the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2027 NFL league championship game is cancelled, postponed after March 31, 2027 ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from NFL (https://www.nfl.com/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.title: NFL Champion 2027
events.description:
This market will resolve according to the team that wins the 2027 NFL league championship. 

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed team to win the 2027 NFL league championship per the rules of the NFL (e.g., they are eliminated in the playoffs), the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2027 NFL league championship game is cancelled, postponed after March 31, 2027 ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from NFL (https://www.nfl.com/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus for the 2027 NFL champion favors the Seattle Seahawks at 11.5% implied probability, buoyed by Mike Macdonald's defensive rebuild yielding early momentum, a versatile offense led by Geno Smith and pass-catchers like DK Metcalf and Jaxon Smith-Njigba, plus ample draft capital for future upgrades. The Los Angeles Rams trail at 8.5%, differentiated by NFC West edge, young weapons including Puka Nacua and Kyren Williams, despite Matthew Stafford's age. Buffalo Bills (7.5%) stand out via Josh Allen's MVP-caliber arm and defensive reinforcements, while Kansas City Chiefs (5.7%) slip amid receiver questions post-Hill era. New England Patriots (5.5%) and Baltimore Ravens (5.3%) gain from quarterback promise in Drake Maye and Lamar Jackson's mobility, underscoring youth and coaching stability as key long-term separators in this fluid futures market.

question: Querétaro FC vs. FC Juárez: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming Liga MX game between Querétaro FC and FC Juárez, scheduled for February 22 at 8:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Querétaro FC and FC Juárez combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligamx.net. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

events.title: Querétaro FC vs. FC Juárez - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Liga MX game, scheduled for February 22 at 8:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Querétaro FC holds a clear edge in trader consensus for their Liga MX Apertura home clash against FC Juárez, driven by superior recent form and a strong record at Estadio Corregidora. Querétaro enters unbeaten in their last three matches, including a vital win over Tigres, while Juárez languishes near the relegation zone with just one victory in nine outings and a dismal 0-4-3 away mark this season. No major injuries reported for either side per official updates, but Juárez misses suspended midfielder Aldo Rocha, weakening their midfield control. Upcoming schedule favors Querétaro with rest advantage, amplifying home-field momentum that has shaped 65% implied probability on their moneyline.

question: Starmer out by March 31, 2026?
description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Keir Starmer ceases to be the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom for any period of time between market creation and March 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

An announcement of Keir Starmer's resignation/removal before this market's end date will immediately resolve this market to "Yes", regardless of when the announced resignation/removal goes into effect.

The resolution source for this market will be the government of the UK, however a consensus of credible reporting will also suffice.

events.title: Starmer out by...?
events.description:

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket's Keir Starmer tenure markets reflects heightened skepticism fueled by Labour's post-budget poll collapse, with support dipping below 30% in recent MRPs amid public fury over tax hikes on employers and pensioner winter fuel cuts. Chancellor Rachel Reeves' October 30 fiscal statement triggered farmer protests, MP rebellions on welfare bills, and Reform UK's surge to 20%+. Starmer quelled internal threats by reshuffling cabinet and winning conference leadership ballot, though low turnout underscored fragility. Upcoming local elections in May 2025 and potential by-elections loom as catalysts; sustained discontent could prompt no-confidence moves or leadership bids.

question: Will Ron Eller be the Republican Nominee for MS-02?
description:
This market will resolve according to the candidate who wins the nomination for the Republican Party to contest the MS-02 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The Democratic primary will take place on March 10, 2026.

If no nominee is announced by November 3, 2026, 11:59PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Republican sources, including https://rnc.org/.

Any replacement of the nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus favors "No" at 67% implied probability, driven primarily by the Powerball jackpot's current $163 million annuity value—far short of $1 billion—with only four drawings remaining through May 31. Recent rollovers, including no grand prize winner in the May 23 drawing, have boosted it incrementally by about $27 million, aligning with typical post-rule-change growth of $20-40 million per draw amid high ticket sales. However, reaching $1 billion would require unprecedented consecutive no-winners and explosive sales unseen since the 2022 record $2.04 billion pot. Cultural hype around mega-jackpots fuels some "Yes" optimism, but math and historical precedents heavily tilt toward rollover limits keeping odds grounded. Key catalyst: May 25 results, potentially pushing to $190 million max.

question: Will any month of 2026 be the hottest on record?
description:
This market will resolve based on the data for the Global Land-Ocean Temperature Index for any month of 2026 versus the data points available for all years for the relevant month on record. If any month of 2026 is the hottest of that month for any year in record, this market will resolve to "Yes". Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Note: If any month of 2026 is tied for hottest with the same month of another year, this market will resolve to "Yes".

The primary resolution source for this market will be the figures found in the table titled "GLOBAL Land-Ocean Temperature Index in 0.01 degrees Celsius" (https://data.giss.nasa.gov/gistemp/tabledata_v4/GLB.Ts+dSST.txt). If NASA's "Global Temperature Index" is rendered permanently unavailable, other information from NASA may be used.

This market may resolve immediately upon the release of data for any month which qualifies towards a "Yes" resolution.

If no information for all months is provided by NASA by January 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, a consensus of credible sources will be used to resolve this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: The 70.5% market-implied probability for a record-hot month in 2026 stems from the accelerating global warming trend, with 14 straight months through August 2024 exceeding the 1.5°C Paris threshold per Copernicus data, including July's all-time high anomaly of +0.81°C above pre-industrial levels. NOAA and ECMWF models project sustained high temperatures into 2026, fueled by rising greenhouse gases and a potential El Niño resurgence after the current La Niña fades, surpassing the 2024 baseline. Recent developments, like September 2024 ranking as the second-hottest on record, reinforce trader consensus, though ENSO variability introduces uncertainty in pinpointing the peak month.

question: Gemini 3.5 released by April 30?
description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Google's Gemini 3.5 model is made available to the general public by April 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

For this market to resolve to "Yes," Gemini 3.5 must be launched and publicly accessible, including via open beta or open rolling waitlist signups. A closed beta or any form of private access will not suffice. The release must be clearly defined and publicly announced by Google as being accessible to the general public.

Gemini 3.5 refers to a product explicitly named Gemini 3.5 (e.g., Gemini 3.5 Pro would count), or one that is recognized as a successor to Gemini 3, similar to the progression from Gemini 2.0 to Gemini 2.5. Products labeled as Gemini 4 or similar will not count for this market's resolution. Additional Gemini 3 models (e.g. a release of Gemini 3 Flash-lite) will not count.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from Google, with additional verification from a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Google's December 2024 launch of Gemini 2.0 Flash and experimental models has anchored trader sentiment, with market-implied odds favoring a Gemini 3.5 release no earlier than mid-2025, reflecting DeepMind's iterative roadmap amid slipping AI model timelines. Recent competitive pressure from Anthropic's Claude 3.5 Sonnet, boasting superior coding benchmarks, underscores the need for substantial leaps, while OpenAI's o1 reasoning series intensifies the race. No official Gemini 3.5 announcements have surfaced, only vague hints in Google Cloud Next recaps; traders eye Q1 2025 earnings and potential I/O leaks as key catalysts, with resolution hinging on a full public API or app deployment meeting version criteria.

description:

An announcement by December 31, 2026, 11:59PM ET of their intention to separate or divorce will be sufficient for a "Yes" resolution, regardless of whether the separation or divorce later actually occurs, or whether the actual separation or divorce occurs outside of the timeframe of this market.

The resolution source will be statements from Ángela Aguilar, Christian Nodal, and/or their representatives, however a definitive consensus of credible media reporting may be considered.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader sentiment tilts slightly toward a "Yes" on Ángela Aguilar and Christian Nodal splitting in 2026 (51.5% implied probability), driven by skepticism over their ultra-swift courtship—Nodal's divorce finalized in May 2024, engagement in June, and private July wedding—which echoes high-profile Latin music divorces amid intense media scrutiny. Balancing this are recent unified appearances at Premios Juventud and affectionate social media posts signaling stability in the regional mexicano scene. The razor-thin odds reflect celebrity marriage volatility, where 50%+ fail within two years per historical data. Key tippers: joint holiday posts or tours reinforcing harmony versus solo promo runs, cheating rumors, or award-season drama that could swing probabilities decisively.

question: Will Maxx Crosby play for Arizona Cardinals next?
description:
This market will resolve to the next team Maxx Crosby officially joins by August 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

If Maxx Crosby does not officially join a new team by August 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Las Vegas Raiders”.

If Maxx Crosby joins a team that is not listed, this market will resolve to “Other”.

If Maxx Crosby is released and is not signed by another team, retires, or is not under contract with any professional team by August 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

Transfers or assignments between a team’s senior team and reserve or affiliate teams will not be considered for this market.

An official signing announcement prior to the market’s close date will immediately resolve this market to the corresponding option.

The primary resolution sources for this market will be official announcements from the Las Vegas Raiders and/or the acquiring team. A consensus of credible media reporting may also be used to resolve the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Maxx Crosby's contract with the Las Vegas Raiders expires after the 2025 season, positioning him as an unrestricted free agent entering 2026 and fueling trader consensus at 76.8% for him staying put amid his vocal loyalty and franchise cornerstone status as their elite edge rusher. Recent developments, including his return from a 2024 biceps injury to post 8.5 sacks in limited games and no trade materializing despite midseason rumors, reinforce Raiders retention odds, bolstered by potential extension talks or franchise tag. Baltimore Ravens (7.8%) and Seattle Seahawks (6.2%) gain traction from pass-rush needs under new schemes—Ravens seeking depth beyond Justin Madubuike, Seahawks building around Boye Mafe—while others trail on weaker roster fits and cap constraints.

If Maxx Crosby does not officially join a new team by August 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Las Vegas Raiders”.

If Maxx Crosby joins a team that is not listed, this market will resolve to “Other”.

If Maxx Crosby is released and is not signed by another team, retires, or is not under contract with any professional team by August 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

Transfers or assignments between a team’s senior team and reserve or affiliate teams will not be considered for this market.

An official signing announcement prior to the market’s close date will immediately resolve this market to the corresponding option.

The primary resolution sources for this market will be official announcements from the Las Vegas Raiders and/or the acquiring team. A consensus of credible media reporting may also be used to resolve the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Maxx Crosby's contract with the Las Vegas Raiders expires after the 2025 season, positioning him as an unrestricted free agent entering 2026 and fueling trader consensus at 76.8% for him staying put amid his vocal loyalty and franchise cornerstone status as their elite edge rusher. Recent developments, including his return from a 2024 biceps injury to post 8.5 sacks in limited games and no trade materializing despite midseason rumors, reinforce Raiders retention odds, bolstered by potential extension talks or franchise tag. Baltimore Ravens (7.8%) and Seattle Seahawks (6.2%) gain traction from pass-rush needs under new schemes—Ravens seeking depth beyond Justin Madubuike, Seahawks building around Boye Mafe—while others trail on weaker roster fits and cap constraints.

question: Will Dallas Cowboys win the 2027 NFL NFC Championship?
description:
This market will resolve according to the team that wins the 2027 NFC championship game.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed team to win the 2027 NFL NFC championship per the rules of the NFL (e.g., they are eliminated in the playoffs), the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2027 NFL NFC championship game is cancelled, postponed after March 31, 2027 ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from NFL (https://www.nfl.com/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.title: Pro Football: 2027 NFC Champion
events.description:
This market will resolve according to the team that wins the 2027 NFC championship game.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed team to win the 2027 NFL NFC championship per the rules of the NFL (e.g., they are eliminated in the playoffs), the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2027 NFL NFC championship game is cancelled, postponed after March 31, 2027 ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

eventMetadata.context_description: The 2027 NFC Champion market's tight clustering atop the leaderboard, with Rams and Seahawks tied at 16.5% implied probabilities, stems from NFC-wide parity fueled by young quarterback upside and roster rebuilds. Both leaders boast cap space, high draft picks, and emerging stars like Puka Nacua and Riq Woolen, positioning them for QB competitions or extensions amid Matthew Stafford and Geno Smith's uncertain futures. Carolina's investment in Bryce Young (8.8%) and San Francisco's defensive core (8.5%) add volatility, while proven playoff threats like the Packers, Lions, and Eagles linger close behind. Recent 2024 momentum shifts highlight how injuries, trades, and rookie developments keep trader sentiment fragmented across a balanced conference.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed team to win the 2027 NFL NFC championship per the rules of the NFL (e.g., they are eliminated in the playoffs), the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2027 NFL NFC championship game is cancelled, postponed after March 31, 2027 ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from NFL (https://www.nfl.com/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: The 2027 NFC Champion market's tight clustering atop the leaderboard, with Rams and Seahawks tied at 16.5% implied probabilities, stems from NFC-wide parity fueled by young quarterback upside and roster rebuilds. Both leaders boast cap space, high draft picks, and emerging stars like Puka Nacua and Riq Woolen, positioning them for QB competitions or extensions amid Matthew Stafford and Geno Smith's uncertain futures. Carolina's investment in Bryce Young (8.8%) and San Francisco's defensive core (8.5%) add volatility, while proven playoff threats like the Packers, Lions, and Eagles linger close behind. Recent 2024 momentum shifts highlight how injuries, trades, and rookie developments keep trader sentiment fragmented across a balanced conference.

eventMetadata.context_description: Baltimore Ravens hold a slim edge in trader consensus for the 2027 AFC Championship at 14%, buoyed by Lamar Jackson's MVP-caliber play and Baltimore's sustained defensive prowess, but the race remains razor-tight with Buffalo (11%), Denver (11%), and Kansas City (10.5%) clustered behind, reflecting widespread AFC parity fueled by young quarterbacks like Josh Allen, Bo Nix, and Patrick Mahomes alongside emerging stars Josh Richardson and C.J. Stroud. Recent offseason maneuvers—Chargers' Jim Harbaugh hire boosting Justin Herbert's outlook, Texans' defensive additions, and Broncos' draft infusion—amplify uncertainty, as cap flexibility, upcoming drafts, and injury resilience will dictate trajectories in a conference where home-field edges and playoff experience often tip close divisional battles. Historical upsets underscore the wisdom of crowds pricing no clear favorite.

question: Relay FDV above $100M one day after launch?
description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Fully Diluted Valuation of Relay's governance token is greater than the value specified in the title 1 day after launch. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No."

The token must be actively, publicly transferable and tradable to be considered a launch.

The FDV will be determined using the total token supply multiplied by the token price.

"1 day after launch" is defined as 4:00 PM ET on the calendar day following launch. The resolution source for this market is the most liquid price source available. If Relay (https://x.com/Relayprotocol) doesn't launch a token by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

"1 day after launch" is defined as 4:00 PM ET on the calendar day following launch. The resolution source for this market is the most liquid price source available. If Relay (https://x.com/Relayprotocol) doesn't launch a token by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".
